name: Mistshore
personality: A duck with no hat and no rush, Mistshore watches your flaky CI pipeline with ◉ eyes the color of still water, content to wait through every retry until the one true fix surfaces. Chaos bounces off Mistshore like a linting error off a perfectly formatted file.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
